meta.method: Streams the LODES OD main (CSV.gz, ~14 MB compressed) and classifies every (home_block → work_block) pair against the LEHD co_xwalk.csv.gz tabblk2020→stplc mapping. within = home and work in the same place; inflow = work in place, home outside; outflow = home in place, work outside. Block-level — no intra-place double-counting (the tract-weighted F39 approximation does).
